svg.text: METHODOLOGY: ZCS-6 (Phase 4 complete) · BENCH: caduceus-bench v1.2.1 · SUBSTRATE: v0.2 PLAN (CADUCEUS-005)
7 HF floors over BP7/BPSec · bench-asserted floor map · HF-16..HF-22 extend VBX-ISPS HF-1..HF-15
Frame-context interlock + root-cause clustering + audit log
URN parse + Caduceus-BodyID v1.0 + dual-version window
Inbound 4-check + Civium gate + revocation stream + defaults
ACI drift monitor · max(empirical, theoretical) floor
Civium · MVCI · Aletheia DAC · Mercury · Bus ISO · Secure Element
Jetson Orin NX · shielded enclosure · 16 GB · ≤200 W
VIEW C — BUNDLE FLOW PATH (cross-section, inbound)
RX physical → BP7 reassemble → BPSec decrypt → F1 → HF-19 URN → HF-21 nonce → HF-17 4-check → HF-22 interlock → app
on-fail → HF-9 (T3) · no LLM-retry path · two-source confirm to exit
Aletheia (provenance / trust strand) · Civium (authority / decision strand) · central bundle stream
17 normative assertions · P:3 B:3 T:7 F:4
20 named attacks closed across 2 Phase-3 sweeps
v0.3 adds DFT mechanisms (3 named in §0)
1. caduceus-bench v1.2.1 cryptographically committed at LEDGER #0004 · SHA-256 0fe3b32db5522db65dda8dbc46b1aa9fcc40c418a21cc8abb2df7340a528f874 · VERIFIED.
2. Single-fault-tolerant (SFT) at v0.2. Dual-fault-tolerance for crewed deployment requires 3 v0.3 substrate mechanisms (dual-peer EPHEMERIS, triple-redundant chain, redundant graph) · VERIFIED.
3. Two interplanetary-specific attack closures (Attack 10 RTT-stale graph; Attack 27 registry transition at light-time) · basis for CADUCEUS-IP-001 and CADUCEUS-IP-002 PPA filings.

4. KeySpace 2024 (Smailes et al., Oxford + armasuisse) is complementary prior art on interplanetary PKI · not anticipating · IP-001 claim scope narrowed accordingly · PLAUSIBLE pending practitioner review.
5. SKETCH ONLY — NOT FOR SUBSTRATE BUILD. Substrate build is CADUCEUS-005 M0-M8 (20 weeks, ~3.25 FTE). Phase 6 attack sweep is CADUCEUS-007 (33 attacks across 8 categories).
